title: Avoid exception testing via JUnit @Test annotation
description: Testing exception via @Test annotation can lead to misleading results due to unexecuted code after the raised exception. Consider moving assertions into a separate test method or using org.junit.Assert.assertThrows.
recommendation: Consider moving any assertions into a separate test method or using org.junit.Assert.assertThrows.
impact: Prevent misleading test results and ensure proper testing of the state of the program after the raised exception.

checks.message: Consider moving any assertions into a separate test method or using org.junit.Assert.assertThrows.
